name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Thank You to Our Veterans
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zdduuhk-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zdduuhk-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- November 11 2015 -
Thank You to Our Veterans

| Dear Peter Willis, November is a great month for Americans. In New York City, we get to look out on Central Park and see the leaves change as we move from the beauty of Fall to a magnificent city cloaked in the chill and briskness of Winter. What we Americans often gloss over is that November is a time for celebrating the very reason we enjoy the freedom, opportunity and prosperity found nowhere else in the world. The reason we are able to live like we do is due to the courage, dedication and sacrifice of those who serve in the armed forces of the United States and to those who have given the last full measure.This November we should pay particular attention to the world situation. All over the world, young men and women who have volunteered to serve this nation are standing watch to protect us from the evil that is focused on taking away all that we value. We have turmoil in the Middle East, unrest in Europe, aggressive expansion in the Pacific Rim and stateless terrorism that threatens every aspect of freedom all across the globe. At no time in history have things been so precarious. Yet, we are able to find the best among us to step forward and take on the traditions and values of generations past, humbly putting on the uniform of this nation. They do so to support and defend the Constitution, not the President, the Congress or even the flag. They swear to defend an idea and an ideal. As is so subtly stated in the Preamble of our Founding Document, they take on the task "to secure Liberty for ourselves and our posterity."On November 10th, the Marine Corps celebrated its 240th birthday. The Marines were, are and will remain unique in the world, a force that is first to fight and last to come home. The Marines have maintained the highest standards and "once a Marine, always a Marine," captures the sense of duty and honor that permeates every pore of those who have worn the Eagle, Globe and Anchor.Today, we honor all veterans who are and have served in the armed forces. This day has special meaning to so many. Over the years, I have hired thousands of veteransand have found them to be among the very best. They bring no attention to themselves except in their extraordinary professionalism and dedication to whatever they choose to do. Quietly, humbly, and without fanfare, they go about their daily lives being great citizens, good moms and dads, and loving, devoted companions. Bearing up under the terrible damage of war, so many carry on with dignity and grace. We should be so proud of them and we should honor them every day.November is also the month we celebrate the Military Family. Too many of us have never had to be away from family and friends on holidays, birthdays and anniversaries. We have never been asked to risk life and limb in places we cannot even find on a map. We go about our daily lives enjoying freedom, most of the time without ever thinking about what it is like to have a loved one in harm's way. The sacrifice and strength of military families, those who also serve, is so important to morale and welfare of those so far from home.I have lived a full life and have benefited more than most from the opportunities found in this country. I have a loving, healthy family and I am running for President -- only in America. To be where I am, I thank God every day for those who stand on the ramparts of liberty with courage, strength, humility and dignity. So, this November, let's celebrate our veterans and their families and keep them in our prayers. Because of these dedicated Americans, we will be able to Make America Great Again!
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-zdduuhk-l-h)

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I'd love it if you were on my debate team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Before Saturday's debate: | Friend --

When I get up on that debate stage, I'm thinking about one thing: you.

You’re my team -- supporters like you who are out there knocking on doors on cold weekend mornings and making donations of $1 here and there to help build something incredible. **Before the debate on Saturday, will you chip in $1 to say you have my back up there?** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM5NzA3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxMTExOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0). name: Marco Rubio
subject: Are you with me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866190:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- I'm emailing you today to ask for your help. All eyes are on our campaign and the support we have. You see, Peter, as we inch closer to the primaries and caucuses, the attacks against my campaign are growing (both from Hillary and the Democrats and Establishment Republicans), but it's only making our campaign stronger - as well as my resolve to fight for our conservative principles. Following Tuesday's debate, we've set a goal to recruit 10,000 conservatives to join our campaign to build A New American Century.
**[If I can count on your support, will you please let me know by making a Special Debate Donation right now, Peter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)**
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**SPECIAL DEBATE DONATION**
**Status: PENDI****NG** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)
---
| I'm back out on the campaign trail today but I've asked my campaign team to provide me with updates throughout the day and tonight I'll review the list of every American who joins our team today. **[_Peter, can I count on you?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** Remember: our goal today is participation and activation -- we need to recruit 10,000 supporters -- **[so even if you can only spare $1, click here to donate now and let me know you're with me.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** When I announced my campaign for President, I outlined a bold vision for our nation -- a vision I can only achieve with your immediate help. **[With your donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** we will be able to reach out to voters all over the country, build a strong campaign, magnify the momentum we need to surge forward to gain the Republican nomination and, ultimately, win the White House. **[Your financial contribution today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** will ensure we are able to fuel our campaign with the best possible assets, but most importantly, it lets us know you're with me.
---
| | [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**SPECIAL DEBATE DONATION**
**Status: PENDI****NG** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)
---
| The time has come for a new generation of conservatives to lead the way toward A New American Century. **[Your donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** will send a strong message to the mainstream media and the nation that our campaign has the fortitude of thousands of supporters in every state and corner of the United States; and together we are going to take our country back. Your support today is pivotal to my campaign's success. So as a personal favor to me, **[will you stand with me today by making an online contribution?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)** Peter, all eyes are on my campaign. I hope to have your support as I continue on this journey to create A New American Century -- I need it now more than ever because we're just a few short weeks away from the first primaries and caucuses. Sincerely, Marco Rubio
P.S. I hope I'll see your name on our supporter list later today. **[Please follow this link to make a donation right now to guarantee your name is there!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)**
---
| | [**Donate Today** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44866191:JR9KNiLNI:m:1:1349778030:67EA89FAAC970A971A5D57A6D89E3618:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Eli Ulanet
subject: Let's Build on Rand's Debate Momentum in VA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Hi Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to see if you would be interested in
helping with the most crucial step of the campaign, which is
getting Rand on the ballot in Virginia. We rely heavily on
volunteers to help us with this process so any time that you can
contribute toward this effort helps us get closer to reaching our
goal, even if you collect just a few signatures.

Following a standout debate performance, it's
important to keep this momentum going and to show the nation the
strength of Rand's grassroots network in Virginia.

If you're interested in being a part of this,
please email us at virginia@randpaul2016.com, or give our office
a call at 571-494-1340 by November 14th. Thanks so much, Fellow Conservative.
I look forward to hearing from you.

- Eli Ulanet

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWVFm6LyNB

name: Ben Carson
subject: Stand against political correctness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
Peter,

I hate political correctness. It's dangerous.

It's being used to divide us and prevent us from speaking
honestly about our challenges.

I'm willing to stand up and fight it, but I need to know if
you'll join me.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596294:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

Nowadays if you're pro-life, you're waging a "war on women." If
you're for traditional marriage, you're a homophobe. If you
emphasize work over welfare, you don't care about the poor.

How ridiculous.

The values upon which America was built allowed us to become the
greatest force for good on the planet. We shouldn't give them
away in the name of political correctness.

I need to know if you stand with me. Will you make a donation to
my campaign now?
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596294:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

Everywhere I go I see more and more people waking up, ready to
push back and revive America. We've now accepted over 800,000
grassroots donations. Over 4 million people have joined me on
Facebook. Our momentum is growing every day and I need your help
now more than ever.

I'm not a politician with my finger in the wind. As your
President, I will do what I believe is right and just -- even if
it makes the PC crowd uncomfortable.

I will secure the border and enforce our laws. I will call our
enemy by its name -- radical Islam -- and protect the American
people. I will institute a flat tax that is simple and fair, and
close the special interest loopholes. I will protect religious
liberty, because it's what makes America free.

Please join me by donating to my campaign right now.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596294:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

If the next generation is going to have the same opportunities
that you and I had, we're going to have to stand up and fight for
our values.

We can't be afraid of being called names. We know what needs to
be done. Please join me.
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596294:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Make a donation:
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596294:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

Show your support for Ben on social media:
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596296:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596297:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596298:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r
http://email.granitelists.com/ct/31596299:sR6plLyNP:m:3:1155937413:DF5C0D9F667C0AEA266CC1FD6E112098:r

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

I'm willing to stand up and fight it, but I need to know if you'll join me. Nowadays if you're pro-life, you're waging a "war on women." If you're for traditional marriage, you're a homophobe. If you emphasize work over welfare, you don't care about the poor. How ridiculous. The values upon which America was built allowed us to become the greatest force for good on the planet. We shouldn't give them away in the name of political correctness. I need to know if you stand with me. Will you make a donation to my campaign now? Everywhere I go I see more and more people waking up, ready to push back and revive America. We've now accepted over 800,000 grassroots donations. Over 4 million people have joined me on Facebook. Our momentum is growing every day and I need your help now more than ever. I'm not a politician with my finger in the wind. As your President, I will do what I believe is right and just -- even if it makes the PC crowd uncomfortable. I will secure the border and enforce our laws. I will call our enemy by its name -- radical Islam -- and protect the American people. I will institute a flat tax that is simple and fair, and close the special interest loopholes. I will protect religious liberty, because it's what makes America free. Please join me by donating to my campaign right now. If the next generation is going to have the same opportunities that you and I had, we're going to have to stand up and fight for our values. We can't be afraid of being called names. We know what needs to be done. Please join me. Sincerely, Ben Carson Make a donation: Show your support for Ben on social media: Carson America, Inc | P.O. name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: It's critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, Gov. John Kasich spoke at this week's GOP debate about how critical it is that our next president have the experience that's been sorely lacking the last eight years.

**Enough is enough with the on-the-job training!**

**[Please chip in $25, $50 or more right now if you agree!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596429:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)**
**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596430:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)**

Gov. Kasich has a plan to balance America's budget and to take money, power & influence away from Washington and return it to the American people.

[With your support, we can continue the growth of our campaign](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596429:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r). Believe it or not, we're less than 100 days away from several of the early states voting in the GOP primary elections!

**[Please consider chipping in $25 or more right now to invest in our campaign!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596429:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)** You can also sign up to volunteer at: [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596431:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)

Thank you.

**John Weaver**
Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596429:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31596429:WOkl2LyNN:m:1:958431888:20BE0799BD739A46AA7F2F1E25DD06A3:r)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: You'll Want To Watch This
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Rand is gaining momentum after Tuesday's debate and the reason why is clear: he proved he was the only conservative on the stage. If you didn't get a chance to catch the debate, watch our new web ad for the highlights and you'll see immediately why everyone is calling this a comeback moment for Rand. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31599202:WxTvKLytN:m:1:879035888:F10605D826664DBD9D5683117AEFB46E:r) Rand took on the biggest issues our country faces: debt, the Fed, and spending trillions of dollars that we don't have, and they're saying he won the debate. This week's victory proves to us that standing up for liberty is not only smart, but popular. We can win this thing. [We just need your help](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31599203:WxTvKLytN:m:1:879035888:F10605D826664DBD9D5683117AEFB46E:r). We put together a **DEBATE VICTORY MONEY BOMB** earlier this week. I hope you can chip in and show the media Rand is here to stay.
| | [$10 Money Bomb >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31599204:WxTvKLytN:m:1:879035888:F10605D826664DBD9D5683117AEFB46E:r)

Doug Stafford

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Main Stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend --

There's only one candidate that has a history of winning in a blue state while championing the conservative values of hardworking American families, and that's me. That's why I belong on the main stage for next month's debate. While other candidates message-test everything they say, I stay true to the values I hold dear, regardless of the stakes. That's how I won Tuesday's debate and how I continue to bring the fight to restore the American dream.

After Tuesday's debate,_National Review's_ Quin Hillyer wrote, "Rick Santorum was the strongest on substance, on sincerity, on likability, and on what I’ll call forward-looking positivity."

These are qualities all sorely lacking on the main stage.

Craig Robinson, of _The Iowa Republican,_ writes, "he's passionate about what he believes in, and it’s easy to tell. He’s not trying to deliver the right answer, he’s telling people exactly what it is he believes. Personally, I think we would be better off with people like that included on the main stage.”

That's why I'm your guy. It's clear that people on the ground are tired of the candidates that only campaign conservative that we see every day from the Washington Establishment, but I'll need your help to keep the momentum going.

[**As one of my strongest supporters, I'm turning to you. Can you chip in a few dollars to help us get the message out that there needs to be a sincere, passionate, and true conservative on that debate stage standing for traditional values, fighting to rebuild the economy, and strengthen our stature overseas?**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3D20151112-s&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=1)

As always, I'm thankful for your support, and will keep the fight going to restore the American dream.

-Rick

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=2) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=3) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=4), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=5), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=6).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20151112_s&n=7)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supriya=20Jindal?=
subject: A powerful video
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT
body:
|
---
| | Bobby did great Tuesday night at the GOP Presidential debate. He had a lot of good answers, but one of the most powerful was when he talked about the reality of big government spending in Washington: “**We keep stealing from our children. That is immoral, that is wrong, and we are creating more government dependence.** ”

Watch Bobby’s answer here:

[](http://bobbyjindal.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=87653a3e8fa722737340ef6fd&id=54c4711aa3&e=c688ac0b49)

You can hear the passion when Bobby speaks. This isn’t just rhetoric for him. We have three children, and Bobby is deeply concerned they will grow up in an America with less opportunity than we had. He’s concerned about the consequences they will face from irresponsible spending decisions by those in Washington. **But he is hopeful that this country’s best days are still ahead.**

I hope you will share this video with your family and friends.

Thank you,

Supriya Jindal

[](http://bobbyjindal.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=87653a3e8fa722737340ef6fd&id=7b079230fe&e=c688ac0b49)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Buzzworthy moments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
Friends, The Florida Democratic Convention was a few weeks ago. There were energetic crowds, inspiring speeches, and most importantly -- a true sense of determination. If we took one thing away from the convention, it's that **Democrats are fighting hard to make sure Patrick gets to the Senate, so we can take back the majority from Republicans.** Let's keep the momentum going. [**Add your name to the list and show you 're committed to sending Patrick to the Senate.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e9/388775869/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151112") Here's a roundup of all the buzzworthy moments at this year's convention:
# Center Stage Spotlight
Patrick accepts an endorsement from former Congressman Barney Frank. Barney said of Patrick, _" I have no doubt he is the best candidate to win this crucial Senate seat so we can take back the Senate."_ | | | |
---|---|---|---
# In The News
Since the Democrats have a chance to take back the Senate in 2016, all eyes are on Florida. Here are a few of the stories that were written about the convention and Patrick's momentum in the race.
* **Miami Herald:**
[Prominent Democrats back Patrick Murphy over Alan Grayson](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349ea/388775869/VEsE/ "http://miamiherald.typepad.com/nakedpolitics/2015/10/prominent-democrats-back-patrick-murphy-over-alan-grayson.html")
* **FloridaPolitics.com:**
[Florida Teamsters Endorse Patrick Murphy for Senate](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349eb/388775869/VEsF/ "http://floridapolitics.com/archives/193579-florida-teamsters-endorse-patrick-murphy-for-senate")
* **Orlando Sentinel:**
[Murphy endorsers praise appeal to independents](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e4/388775869/VEsC/ "http://www.orlandosentinel.com/news/politics/political-pulse/os-murphy-grabs-endorsements-at-dems-meeting-20151031-post.html")

# For the Record
Patrick delivered a rousing speech to an audience of 1,500 Democrats. He spoke about his fond memories growing up in Florida and pledged his commitment to working for Florida families. He said, _"No matter what the issue is, I consider how it impacts the people of this state and how it impacts this country. My pledge to you is that I will always fight each and every day to make sure the people of Florida always come first. "_
# In Good Company
In addition to former Congressman Barney Frank, many prominent national Democrats have thrown their support behind Patrick. His list of supporters includes: | Sen. Amy Klobuchar
Sen. Claire McCaskill
Sen. Tim Kaine
Sen. Martin Heinrich
Sen. Chris Murphy | Sen. Brian Schatz
Sen. Cory Booker
Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse
The Florida Teamsters
---|---
[**Add your name here**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e9/388775869/VEsD/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151112")
---
The Florida Democratic Convention was a resounding success. Democrats everywhere are rallying behind Patrick to help him win his seat and turn the Senate blue. [**Join our efforts and show Patrick you've got his back.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e9/388775869/VEsA/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151112")
| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e5/388775869/VEsB/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e6/388775869/VEsO/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2135/738133e4/3a3b1af7/7f8349e7/388775869/VEsP/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
